text:
AI is transforming the modern workplace in several important ways. One major change is automation, where AI handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, freeing up employees for more creative work. Many businesses now use AI-powered productivity tools, such as smart assistants and analytics software, to help workers complete tasks faster and make better decisions.

However, AI isn't just replacing jobs—it's changing them. Human-AI collaboration is becoming common, with people working alongside AI systems to solve complex problems. For example, doctors use AI to analyze medical images, while marketing teams rely on AI to predict customer trends. While some jobs may disappear, new roles are emerging, such as AI trainers and data analysts. Ultimately, adapting to these changes through learning will be key for workers.
